name: Easy Caramel Apple Pie
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Chopped Jonathan or Rome Apples
recipeInstructions:
1. Break 10 caramel candies into pieces and combine with flour.
2. Add chopped Jonathan or Rome apples, caramel ice cream topping, and lemon juice to the caramel-flour mixture. Stir until well combined.
3. Pour the filling into a frozen, regular 9-inch Pecan Ritz pie crust on a preheated baking sheet.
4. Sprinkle pecan pieces over the top of the filling.
5. Bake at 375°F for 40-45 minutes.
6. Allow to cool before storing at room temperature.
